meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Amit Sangani: Unlock the Power of Open Source with Llama
meta.description:
In this session, Amit Sangani, Director of Partner Engineering at Meta, explores how open-source AI—specifically the Llama ecosystem—is enabling developers to innovate faster, reduce costs, and build responsibly.

From Llama models and the Llama Stack to tools that support trust and safety, this talk breaks down the growing set of resources available to developers and organizations working at the edge of AI product development.

Amit also shares why open-source collaboration is not just a philosophy, but a practical strategy for scaling AI applications in an evolving tech landscape.

Keep building,
DeepLearning.AI
